testcase.name: RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should trigger debounced search after 300ms when typing
RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should combine search and filter state in API call
RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should display loading indicator during search
RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should maintain layout stability during search
RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should display search results info message
RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should reset to all posts when search is cleared
RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should handle empty search query by loading all posts
RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should show "Searching..." status during active search
RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should show no results message when search returns empty
RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should handle search errors gracefully

testcase.name: RealSocialMediaFeed - Search Integration Tests > should preserve filter state when performing search
